title: Luscious Jammy Dutch Lotusroot Gratin
description: A creamy, cheese-pull Dutch gratin with sweet lotusroot marinated in apricot jam, cooked to perfection in an iron teppan for a satvik-friendly lunch.
instructions: Preheat an iron teppan over medium-high heat.
In a saucepan melt butter and whisk in flour to make a roux.
Gradually pour in milk, stir until smooth, and season with salt, pepper, and thyme.
Fold in grated gouda, parmesan, and beaten egg until melted and glossy.
Arrange sliced lotusroot in the teppan and drizzle apricot jam over the layers.
Pour the cheese sauce over the lotusroot, spreading evenly.
Cook until the edges brown and the cheese pulls, about 15 minutes.
Add a handful of thyme on top and cover with a lid for 5 minutes to finish cooking.
Remove from heat, let rest 5 minutes before slicing.
Plate and serve warm, optionally accompanied by steamed greens.
